channel.title: Yayaka's website
channel.description: Having fun with lines of code

item.title: Summary: Ao no Kanata no Four Rhythms
item.description:
The game opens on a short scene between a sad young girl who needs to go and a young boy who tries to cheer her up by giving him something precious to him. The boy promises the girl that if she holds it and makes a wish to the sky, he’ll come flying right away to save her. The boy is the main character, Masaya Hinata, who used to believe everything was within his reach as a kid, thanks [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/aokana.htm

item.title: Summary: Itai no wa Iya nanode Bougyoryoku ni Kyokufuri Shitai to Omoimasu
item.description:
Aliases: “BOFURI: I Don’t Want to Get Hurt, so I’ll Max Out My Defense.” “BOFURI: I Don’t Want to Get Hurt, so I’ll Max Out My Defense. Season 2” MAL: https://myanimelist.net/anime/38790/Itai_no_wa_Iya_nanode_Bougyoryoku_ni_Kyokufuri_Shitai_to_Omoimasu https://myanimelist.net/anime/41514/Itai_no_wa_Iya_nanode_Bougyoryoku_ni_Kyokufuri_Shitai_to_Omoimasu_2 Kaede gets convinced by her (gamer) friend, Risa. to start playing a new VRMMO titled New World Online. She picks “Maple” as her name, and a great shield as her weapon. She doesn’t want to get hurt, so she decides to spend all of her skill points [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/bofuri.htm

item.title: Summary: Kusuriya no Hitorigoto
item.description:
Aliases: The Apothecary Diaries MAL: https://myanimelist.net/anime/54492/Kusuriya_no_Hitorigoto Maomao is an apothecary who is close with women working at a brothel. She gets kidnapped and sold off to the royal court, where she starts living as a servant in the rear palace. The newborn children of Concubines Lihua and Gyokuyou suddenly fall ill, as well as their mothers. Maomao figures out the cause and warns them, but Lihua does not listen to the warning and her child dies. Concubine Gyokuyou gets [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/kusuriya_no_hitorigoto.htm

item.title: Summary: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete
item.description:
Aliases: Gushing over Magical Girls MAL: https://myanimelist.net/anime/54722/Mahou_Shoujo_ni_Akogarete Magical girls named Tres Magia fight against Enormita, an evil organization trying to take over the world. Hiiragi Utena meets Venalita, a mascot of the evil organization. Claiming she has the power of a chosen one, he recruits her and gives her the power of transform. Utena refuses, but Venalita follows and tries to convince her. Utena is forced into a confrontation against Tres Magia and summons a flower monster that binds [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/mahou_shoujo_ni_akogarete.htm

item.title: Summary: Oshi no Ko
item.description:
MC is a doctor in a small countryside clinic. He’s a fan of the idol Ai because of one of his patients, a young girl the age of Ai that used to be a big fan of her. One day, Ai arrives at the clinic because she is pregnant. She has the greedy goal of birthing her children (twins) while still becoming a top idol. Doctor vows to help her achieve this dream. The day the kids are expected, [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/oshi_no_ko.htm

item.title: Summary: Shoujo Fujuubun
item.description:
An aspiring author struggles to get published and witnesses a little girl get run over by a truck. What surprises him the most is the unusual reaction of her friend, who carefully saves the game she was playing before running towards her dead friend screaming. A few days later, as he was riding his bike to his university, his bike came to a sudden stop and he got ejected. The culprit was a recorder that somehow got stuck in [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/shoujo_fujuubun.htm

item.title: Summary: Strike Witches S1
item.description:
Created: Last updated: Aliases: Strike Witches MAL: https://myanimelist.net/anime/3667/Strike_Witches The episode begins with an introduction of the historical context: in the year 1939, entities given the name of Neuroi started appearing from dark, cloudy, vortex-like formations in the sky. Their origin or goals were unknown, but they started attacking humanity and destroying countries. As a countermeasure, humanity invented an anti-Neuroi weapon: the Striker Unit. It’s a tool resembling a pair of torpedos that augments magical power and allows its user [..]
Read more at https://yyk.fr/notes/strike_witches_s1.htm
